ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analyst_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the action is for */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who made the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Initiated, Upgrade, Downgrade) */,
  "target_price" TEXT /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "action_source" TEXT /* Source of the action (e.g., report, news article, conference call) */,
  "prev_rating" TEXT /* Analyst's previous rating for the stock */,
  "prev_target_price" TEXT /* Analyst's previous target price for the stock */,
  "conflict_of_interest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the analyst or their firm has a conflict of interest with the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_actions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_actions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_actions_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm the analyst works for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the analyst */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Relevant work experience of the analyst */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the analyst */,
  "firm_start_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined their current firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_firm_name FOREIGN KEY ("firm_name") REFERENCES firm ("firm_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock went public */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current trading price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES stock_industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the sector (e.g., GICS code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., Initiated, Upgrade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "action_subtype" TEXT /* More specific classification of the action type (e.g., 'Upgrade' could be 'Price Target Increase' or 'Rating Upgrade') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_subtype" TEXT /* More specific classification of the rating (e.g., 'Buy' could be 'Strong Buy' or 'Buy with Caution') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price impact event */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action that impacted the stock price */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock affected by the action */,
  "before_action_price" TEXT /* Price of the stock before the action */,
  "after_action_price" TEXT /* Price of the stock after the action */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price due to the action */,
  "price_impact_date" TEXT /* Date the price impact occurred */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Trade volume on the day of the price impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_impact_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES analyst_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_impact_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, trader, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., portfolio management, trading) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "firm_description" TEXT /* Description of the firm */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the firm was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Firm's website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Firm's headquarters location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_firm_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analyst */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the firm */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst started working at the firm */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst left the firm (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_firm_history_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firm ("firm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_firm_history_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, report view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
